name: Feather Bed Eggs
recipeIngredient: 1 Recipe Skillet-Sizzled, crumbled into large chunks and left to dry overnight
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Spray a 14 x 11" shallow baking dish with vegetable cooking spray.
3. Spread the cornbread in an even layer in the prepared dish.
4. Sprinkle lightly with salt and pepper.
5. Pour the cheese over the top.
6. Whisk together the eggs, milk, and seasonings until blended.
7. Pour this mixture over the cornbread.
8. Bake until the eggs are set and the top is lightly browned and slightly puffed, about 30 minutes. Do not overbake.
